channel.title: INall
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INall, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Anthropic is now worth $380 billion and sharing new details about how much money it makes
item.description: The $30 billion Series G funding round, which involves Microsoft and Nvidia as backers, comes as Anthropic’s products begin to pressure legacy softwar...

item.title: Why Cisco’s stock is falling hard — and taking the tech sector with it
item.description: Arista’s stock is dropping ahead of earnings, after Cisco’s report sparked renewed fears about the impact of high memory prices.

item.title: Waymo Asks the DC Public to Pressure Their City Officials
item.description: Stuck in regulatory limbo, the self-driving-vehicle developer is encouraging residents of Washington, DC, to message public officials to help get its ...

item.title: Exercise Benefits for a Faster Metabolism
item.description: More intense workouts can temporarily raise your metabolic rate. Learn how exercise affects metabolism and which workouts have the greatest impact.

item.title: More ‘see-through’ issues surface for Lululemon, and the stock is taking a hit
item.description: The athleisure company’s stock falls after more “see-through” complaints surfaced about a new leggings line.

item.title: Celebrate Valentine’s Day at these airports
item.description: Airports across the U.S. celebrate Valentine's Day with pop-ups, card-making stations, candy, craft tables and more.

item.title: 'RHONY' Reunion Show Not Replacing Jill Zarin After Firing
item.description: Jill Zarin is out at the 'RHONY' reunion show "The Golden Life," but producers aren't looking to fill her big shoes, at least as of now ... TMZ has le...

item.title: ‘I feel the clock ticking’: My wife and I are in our 60s — and employ 48 people in a small town. Can we ever retire?
item.description: “We could survive financially, but my people would not.”

item.title: This Is The Best Tasting Clear Whey Protein (& I’ve Tried Dozens)
item.description: I actually crave it daily.

item.title: Didero lands $30M to put manufacturing procurement on ‘agentic’ autopilot
item.description: Didero functions as an agentic AI layer that sits on top of a company’s existing ERP, acting as a coordinator that reads incoming communications and a...

item.title: Heavy Weights or High Reps: The Surprising Truth About What Builds Muscle Best
item.description: Low reps or high volume?

item.title: Travel light: PHX joins the list of airports where you can check in your bags remotely
item.description: Phoenix Sky Harbor International Airport (PHX) joins the remote bag check club with the introduction of Early Bag Check.

item.title: A Wave of Unexplained Bot Traffic Is Sweeping the Web
item.description: From small publishers to US federal agencies, websites are reporting unusual spikes in automated traffic linked to IP addresses in Lanzhou, China.

item.title: D4vd's Family Summoned to Testify as Witnesses, But They're Fighting It
item.description: This looks like a big update in the D4vd case ... prosecutors want to call the singer's mother, father, and brother to testify before the grand jury i...

item.title: YouTube finally launches a dedicated app for Apple Vision Pro
item.description: When Apple Vision Pro first came out two years ago, YouTube hesitated to release a dedicated app. Today is the day they officially launch one.

item.title: We Tested A Bunch Of Fitness Apps — Here’s What We’d Actually Pay For
item.description: Revamp your routine.

item.title: 11 best cruises to Canada and New England
item.description: Canada and New England cruises can be fun for families and couples of all ages in summer and fall. Here are 11 of the best options.

item.title: Ja Rule Apologizes for Mid-Flight Fight With Tony Yayo
item.description: Another day, another celeb apology ... this time Ja Rule is owning up to his mile-high meltdown with Tony Yayo. The rapper dropped a statement Thursda...

item.title: 3 Blood Tests Every Woman Should Know For Heart & Stroke Risk
item.description: And what to do to improve them.

item.title: Why Capital One’s JFK lounge won Best New Credit Card Lounge at the 2026 TPG Awards
item.description: The Capital One Lounge at New York's John F. Kennedy International Airport has standout food and a drinks and a stylish, always-open space that makes ...

item.title: Robinhood’s stock is now trading almost exactly like bitcoin — but it really shouldn’t be
item.description: Robinhood’s stock is hitting a fresh low as it follows the selloff in bitcoin, even through crypto trading is a relatively small part of its business.

item.title: Cardi B Concert Fight Ends With Hot Dog Left on Hood of Bystander's Car, on Video
item.description: Cardi B was NOT the drama on the opening night of her new tour ... but her fans were! A parking lot brawl broke out after the show, which ended with a...

item.title: Anthropic raises another $30B in Series G, with a new value of $380B
item.description: The infusion of funding for the AI startup takes place as it is vying for customers and cultural attention with its competitor, OpenAI.

item.title: Why the Wells Fargo Autograph won No-Annual-Fee Credit Card of the Year at the 2026 TPG Awards
item.description: The Wells Fargo Autograph Card took home TPG's 2026 No-Annual-Fee Credit Card of the Year award. Here are four reasons why it stood out from the rest.

item.title: Cardi B's Stripper Past Mocked by Homeland Security After Her ICE Diss
item.description: The Department of Homeland Security is clapping back at Cardi B's ICE diss ... by digging up her stripper past! ICYMI ... Cardi opened her "Little Mis...
